'''Corvis Minor V''' in the [[Corvis Minor system/Legends|Corvis Minor system]] was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbited by six [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Distna]]. It was a gray-orange [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located near an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
